message:
feat(commands): scripting NOSCRIPT, stream existence, ACL canonicalization

A bundle of Redis-7 wire-parity improvements that all touch the
command-dispatch / runtime / store chain and can't be split without
breaking the build.

crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs
  * Scripting NOSCRIPT: adds `SCRIPT_NOSCRIPT_ERROR` +
    `script_noscript_command_error()` helper. Used by the EVAL*
    family when a requested SHA1 isn't in the script cache —
    replaces the prior generic ERR with the exact upstream
    "ERR This Redis command is not allowed from script" string.
  * Import `sha1_hex_public` from fr-store (see fr-store section)
    so the scripting helpers can produce the SHA1 hex string Redis
    stores in the script cache key without duplicating the sha1
    impl inside fr-command.
  * `build_unknown_args_preview(argv)` made `pub` (was private) so
    fr-runtime can use it for the `CommandError::UnknownCommand`
    args preview when a MULTI/EXEC block is EXECABORT'd by an
    unknown command.
  * XDEL: when the stream key doesn't exist,
    `store.xlast_id_with_existence` is now queried up-front and we
    return Integer(0) immediately instead of letting the inner xdel
    path produce a different error — matches Redis behavior
    on XDEL against missing keys.
  * XRANGE / XREVRANGE: on COUNT=0, return `RespFrame::Array(None)`
    (nil array) instead of `Array(Some(vec![]))` (empty array).
    Matches Redis 7 behavior; empty arrays are reserved for the
    "key exists, no matches" case.

crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs
  * New imports: `build_unknown_args_preview` from fr-command.
  * New `wrong_arity_error(command)` helper emitting the
    `"ERR wrong number of arguments for '<cmd>' command"` string
    in the exact Redis-7 form.
  * Two new public ACL entrypoints (called by `fuzz_acl_rules`):
      - `canonicalize_acl_rules(content: &str) -> Result<String, String>`
        parses an ACL file and returns the canonical
        `ACL SAVE`-format serialization.
      - `acl_list_entries_from_rules(content: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>, String>`
        parses an ACL file and returns the observable `ACL LIST`
        entries.
    Both construct an `AuthState::default()` internally so callers
    don't have to manage lifetime/borrow of the full runtime state.
  * MULTI / EXEC / DISCARD handlers now receive `&argv` and route
    unknown-command EXECABORT through `CommandError::UnknownCommand
    { command, args_preview: build_unknown_args_preview(&argv) }`
    into `.to_resp()` — matching Redis's arity-then-command error
    ordering so clients get the same diagnostic string upstream
    emits.
  * HELLO AUTH shadowing: when a single HELLO carries two AUTH
    pairs (shadowed option), the *last* one wins — now handled in
    the HELLO path so the effective auth state matches Redis.

crates/fr-store/src/lib.rs
  * New public `sha1_hex_public(input: &[u8]) -> String` wrapping
    the crate's existing sha1 implementation. Needed by fr-command
    scripting helpers without requiring fr-command to re-import
    the sha1 crate.

crates/fr-protocol/src/lib.rs
  * Resolves a RespFrame-format corner case triggered by the new
    XRANGE/XREVRANGE `Array(None)` return: the frame writer's
    "empty vs. nil array" discriminant now correctly emits `*-1\r\n`
    vs `*0\r\n` — previously both shapes serialized to `*0\r\n`,
    which would have silently broken the XRANGE parity change
    above.

Cargo.lock
  * Workspace re-lock for the fr-runtime → fr-command ↔ fr-store
    dep graph refresh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
